# forgotPassword

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the forgotPassword mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk forgot-password --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.email <Email>
```

## Examples

csdk forgot-password --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.email <Email>
